caption.full:
Emmy Rossum clarifies her Shameless exit on Call Her Daddy podcast

Emmy Rossum addressed speculation about leaving Shameless on the Call Her Daddy podcast. She debunked rumors that she left to have babies, stating she had already set up her production company and had a show greenlit. Rossum felt she had squeezed all the juice out of the lemon after 110 episodes.

What do you think drove Emmy Rossum to leave Shameless right as her production company is taking off?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#CelebrityNews #Shameless #EmmyRossum #CallHerDaddy
caption.firstComment: I’m curious — do you feel her exit was the right move for her creatively, or could it have changed the show’s dynamic?

facebook.text: Emmy Rossum clarified her departure from Shameless on the Call Her Daddy podcast, debunking rumors she left to have children. "The idea that I left to have babies is a misconception," Rossum stated. She had already launched her production company with a show greenlit. What are your thoughts on her decision?

youtube.title: Emmy Rossum Left Shameless For Production Company
youtube.description:
Emmy Rossum clarified her Shameless exit on the Call Her Daddy podcast, debunking baby rumors. Rossum stated she left to pursue her own production company, which already had a show greenlit. She loved the job but felt "there was not enough juice to squeeze out of the lemon" after 110 episodes. John Wells encouraged her directing.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/celebrity/emmy-rossum-addresses-misconception-about-her-exit-from-shameless/
